coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加3层[Paralysis] 
[OnSucceedAttack] 使自身获得5层[Charge]

[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加3层[Paralysis] 
[OnSucceedAttack] 使自身获得7层[Charge] 
[OnSucceedAttackHead] 下回合随机使2名友方单位获得1层[VioletResultUp] 与1层[Agility]

[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加3层[Paralysis] 
[EndSkill] 使自身获得7层[Charge] 
[EndSkillHead] 下回合随机使2名友方单位获得1层[VioletResultUp] 与1层[Agility] ，并使自身获得3层[Charge]

[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加5层[Paralysis] 
[OnSucceedAttack] 使自身获得7层[Charge]

[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加5层[Paralysis] 
[OnSucceedAttack] 使自身获得10层[Charge] 
[OnSucceedAttackTail] 下回合随机对2名单位施加2层[Paralysis] 与2层[Binding]

[OnSucceedAttack] 对目标施加5层[Paralysis] 
[EndSkill] 使自身获得10层[Charge] 
[EndSkillTail] 下回合随机对2名单位施加2层[Paralysis] 与2层[Binding] ，并使其获得3层[Charge]

2020411.name: 适应型放电
2020411.desc:
自身带有[Charge] 时，每层[Charge] 使自身造成的伤害+2%。
技能的[Charge] 层数消耗量降低2层。
